## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) and are signed off (`git commit -s`).
- [ ] Tests added or updated for changes to `core/`, `apps/api/`, or `apps/worker/`.
- [ ] `make test`, `cargo fmt --check`, `cargo clippy`, and `pnpm -r lint` pass locally.
- [ ] Documentation updated (`README.md`, `docs/`, ADR if applicable).
- [ ] Database migrations are append-only.
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented in `CHANGELOG.md` and called out below.
